brand.name: Dheovani Xavier
hero.title: Robust, scalable, well-structured systems.
hero.text: I work on architecture definition, system modernization, and solutions designed to grow with stability.
profile.label: Specialty
profile.text: Software architecture, performance, integrations, technical modeling, and sustainable evolution of digital products.
about.title: Software architecture for systems built to last.
about.paragraphOne: I am a software architect specialized in building robust, optimized systems prepared to evolve. My work combines technical vision, business understanding, and judgment to make decisions that reduce complexity without sacrificing room for growth.
about.paragraphTwo: I work on architecture definition, existing codebase reviews, integration design, performance improvements, and code organization for teams that need predictable delivery. My focus is creating solid foundations for reliable digital products.
about.highlightOneText: Clear, scalable technical structures aligned with product goals.
about.highlightTwoText: Optimization of systems, flows, queries, and critical processing points.
about.highlightThreeText: Gradual modernization, technical debt reduction, and easier-to-maintain foundations.
about.photoAlt: Profile photo of the portfolio author
